Initializer# init(sphereWithExtent:segments:inwardNormals:geometryType:allocator:)

iOS 9.0+iPadOS 9.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.11+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
init(
    sphereWithExtent extent: vector_float3,
    segments: vector_uint2,
    inwardNormals: Bool,
    geometryType: MDLGeometryType,
    allocator: (any MDLMeshBufferAllocator)?
)
```
